compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect plugin boundary enforcement
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Scope: Update living reference docs and navigation files after S1-S4 complete. Updates: (1) docs/reference/system-landscape.md — add plugin boundary section (what is shipped vs project-local); atomic Tier 3 overwrite. (2) llms.txt — add entries for docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/. Done Definitions: system-landscape.md contains plugin boundary section; llms.txt references new project-local dirs; no Tier 3 doc references plugins/dso/docs/designs/ or similar; system-landscape.md last_synced_commit updated to HEAD. Considerations: [Maintainability] Tier 3 uses atomic overwrites — state current reality, never append change history. [Maintainability] Verify no conflict with doc-writer agent S4 auto-updates to system-landscape.md. Escalation Policy: Escalate when blocked.
